titleStmt.title: SII 9.580: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 580. (A.R. No. 576 of 1912.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT LEPAKSHI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1459, Hēmaḷambi, Āshāḍha, śu. 12, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1537 June 20, Wednesday, not Monday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Achyutarāya-Mallapaṇṇa purchased from Timmapa, son of Bhaṇḍārada Apparasa of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Kātyāyana-sūtra and Śuklayajuś- sākhā the mānya village, Nandicherla, and presented it for the service of the god Vīrēśa. This village, surnamed Virūpāksharāyapura, is stated to have been granted as a mānya to Timmappa's grandfather Vīramarasa by Virūpākshadēva-Mahārāya in Śaka 1389, Sarvajit, Pushya, śu. 2, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1467 December 28, Monday. The sale price was fixed by the Madhyasthas. The record is damaged at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīvīrācyutarāya(ḥ)śrīmallapaṁṇamahībhujā . krītvā bhaṁḍāramapparasaputrāt timmarsamaṁtriṇā . vīrapaṁṇapra
saṁnaśrīvīrēśasya samarpitaḥ . grāmā śrīnaṁdicarlā khyāḥ . pūrvaśāsanasaṁstitaḥ . virūpākṣamahārāyasamudrapratināma
kaḥ . śilāvāṭaśāsanēsmin likhyatē dēśabhāṣayā . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1459 neya hē
maḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha śu 12 sōmavāra pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
śrīacyutadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁ geyivuttiralu mallikārjunadēvara nijabhaktarāda Acutarāyamallapaṁṇagaḷu
bhāradvājagōtrada kātyāyanasūtrada śuklayajuśśākheya bhaṁḍārada Aparsara makaḷu tiṁmapagaḷa kaiyalū Ā bhaṁ
ḍārada tiṁmapagaḷa muttayya vīramarsaṁge . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa pararāyabhayaṁ
kara hiṁdurāyasuratrāṇa gajabēṁṭekāra pravuḍhapratāpadēvamahārāyara kumāra śrīvirūpākṣadēvamahārāyara kaiyya
lū svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1389 neya sarvajitusaṁvatsarada puṣyaśu 2 sōmavāra
makarasaṁkrāṁti pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū tuṁgabhadrātīra bhāskarakṣētra śrīvirūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadā
nadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhārāgruhītavāgi baṁdaṁthā nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja
svāmya sahitavāda dānādikrayaparivartanegaḷige yōgyavāda buruḍakuṁṭṭeya rājyada kārakārikeya staḷada naṁdicerla yeṁba grā
make pratināmavāda virūpākṣarāyapuraveṁba sarvamā(ṁ)nyada Agrahāravanū dhāreyarerasikoṁḍu I Agrahārada mūlasvāvi vīrama
rsara mo(ṁ)mmakkaḷu bhaṁḍārada tiṁmapagaḷa kaiyyalū �yo Acyutarāyamalapaṁṇagaḷu tatkālōcita madhyastaparikalpitavāda krayamūlyadravyava
taṁma svāmi Acuta
bā varakumāra penugoṁḍe
dēvarige dhūpa dīpa Amrutapaḍi
dānadhārāpūrvakavāgi śāśa
nada prati . śatṛṇāpi kṛtō dharmaḥ
Digital edition of SII 9.580 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
